mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer_t WHERE active = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(monthly_amount), 0) FROM customer_t WHERE active = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(monthly_visit), 0) FROM customer_t WHERE active = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer_t WHERE active = 0 AND grade = #{grade}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer_t WHERE active = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(reg_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m')
SELECT * FROM customer_t WHERE c_idx = #{c_idx} AND active = 0
SELECT * FROM customer_t WHERE name = #{name} AND active = 0 ORDER BY c_idx DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT grade, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM customer_t WHERE active = 0 GROUP BY grade ORDER BY FIELD(grade, 'VIP', '골드', '실버', '일반')
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(reg_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM customer_t WHERE active = 0 AND reg_date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

SELECT CASE WHEN visit_count = 0 THEN '0회' WHEN visit_count BETWEEN 1 AND 4 THEN '1-4회' WHEN visit_count BETWEEN 5 AND 14 THEN '5-14회' WHEN visit_count BETWEEN 15 AND 29 THEN '15-29회' ELSE '30회+' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM customer_t WHERE active = 0 GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY FIELD(bucket, '0회', '1-4회', '5-14회', '15-29회', '30회+')
SELECT * FROM customer_t WHERE active = 0 ORDER BY visit_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(visit_count), 0) FROM customer_t WHERE active = 0

SELECT c_idx, name, phone, grade, visit_count, COALESCE(monthly_visit, 0) AS monthly_visit, COALESCE(monthly_amount, 0) AS monthly_amount, memo, reg_date, active FROM customer_t WHERE active = 0 ORDER BY CASE grade WHEN 'VIP' THEN 1 WHEN '골드' THEN 2 WHEN '실버' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, visit_count DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO customer_t (name, phone, grade, visit_count, memo, birthday, active) VALUES ( #{name}, #{phone}, #{grade}, 0,
#{memo} '' ,
#{birthday} NULL , 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE customer_t SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, grade = #{grade}, memo = #{memo}, birthday = #{birthday} NULL
WHERE c_idx = #{c_idx}
UPDATE customer_t SET grade = #{grade} WHERE c_idx = #{c_idx}
UPDATE customer_t SET active = 1 WHERE c_idx = #{c_idx}
UPDATE customer_t SET monthly_visit = 0, monthly_amount = 0 WHERE active = 0
UPDATE customer_t SET visit_count = visit_count + 1 WHERE c_idx = #{c_idx}
UPDATE customer_t SET last_visit_date = NOW() WHERE c_idx = #{c_idx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO visit_log_t (c_idx, amount, menu_item, note) VALUES (#{c_idx}, #{amount}, #{menuItem}, #{note})
mapper.select: SELECT log_idx, c_idx, amount, menu_item, note, reg_date FROM visit_log_t WHERE c_idx = #{c_idx} ORDER BY reg_date DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT tag FROM customer_tag_t WHERE c_idx = #{c_idx} ORDER BY tag_idx

SELECT c_idx, name, phone, grade, visit_count, memo, reg_date, last_visit_date, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer_coupon_t cc WHERE cc.c_idx = c.c_idx AND cc.used = 0 AND cc.expire_date >= CURDATE()) AS coupon_count FROM customer_t c WHERE active = 0 AND ( last_visit_date IS NULL AND reg_date < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) OR last_visit_date < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ) ORDER BY last_visit_date ASC, reg_date ASC LIMIT 100

SELECT c_idx, name, phone, grade, visit_count, memo, birthday, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer_coupon_t cc WHERE cc.c_idx = c.c_idx AND cc.used = 0 AND cc.expire_date >= CURDATE()) AS coupon_count FROM customer_t c WHERE active = 0 AND birthday IS NOT NULL AND MONTH(birthday) = MONTH(CURDATE()) ORDER BY DAY(birthday)

SELECT HOUR(reg_date) AS hour_slot, COUNT(*) AS visit_cnt, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total_amount FROM visit_log_t WHERE reg_date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH) GROUP BY hour_slot ORDER BY hour_slot
SELECT DAYOFWEEK(reg_date) AS dow, COUNT(*) AS visit_cnt, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total_amount FROM visit_log_t WHERE reg_date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH) GROUP BY dow ORDER BY dow
SELECT menu_item, COUNT(*) AS order_cnt FROM visit_log_t WHERE menu_item IS NOT NULL AND menu_item != '' GROUP BY menu_item ORDER BY order_cnt DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT grade, ROUND(AVG(monthly_amount), 0) AS avg_monthly, ROUND(AVG(visit_count), 1) AS avg_visit, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM customer_t WHERE active = 0 GROUP BY grade ORDER BY FIELD(grade, 'VIP', '골드', '실버', '일반')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer_t WHERE active = 0 AND (name LIKE #{keyword} OR phone LIKE #{keyword})
AND grade = #{grade}
